violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Open package of raw chicken in bucket was not date marked in refrigerator.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Raw chicken equipment needed cleaning more frequent.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Missing ceiling tiles exposing rafter.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Sausage croissants, sausage biscuits held below 140 in hot case.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
